parameters.query: SELECT id, channel_id, channel_name FROM youtube_channels WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id
SELECT video_id FROM processed_videos WHERE video_id = $1

parameters.text:
=You are writing a high-engagement LinkedIn post for a content creator who reposts key insights from YouTube interviews.

## VIDEO DATA
Channel: {{ $json.channel_name }}
Video Title: {{ $json.video_title }}
Speaker: {{ $json.speaker_name }}{{ $json.speaker_title ? ', ' + $json.speaker_title : '' }}

Top Quotes:
{{ $json.top_quotes.map((q, i) => `${i+1}. "${q}"`).join('\n') }}

Key Insights:
{{ $json.key_insights.map((k, i) => `${i+1}. ${k}`).join('\n') }}

Narrative Summary:
{{ $json.narrative_summary }}

Most Surprising Statement:
{{ $json.surprising_statement }}

## POST REQUIREMENTS
- 150-200 words total
- Open with the most compelling quote in full quotation marks
- Immediately attribute it: "— {{ $json.speaker_name }}"
- Follow with 2-3 punchy insight bullets
- Close with one provocative question to drive comments
- End with 3-5 relevant hashtags on a new line
- Tone: Direct, opinionated, authoritative (think Scott Galloway)
- NO "I watched this video" or "Check this out" openers
- NO promotional language
- Plain text only — no HTML tags

Return ONLY valid JSON.

options.systemMessage: You are a JSON-only API that writes viral LinkedIn posts. Return only valid JSON.

parameters.text:
=## Role
You are an AI Prompting Specialist generating a featured image for a LinkedIn post about a YouTube interview.

## Input
**Speaker:** {{ $json.output.post_title }}
**Post Preview:** {{ $json.output.post_text.substring(0, 300) }}

## Visual Style
Choose the best fit:
- **Portrait + Quote Card:** Clean, modern design with a bold quote overlaid on an abstract gradient or geometric background. Best for provocative personal statements.
- **Conceptual Chalk Drawing:** Dramatic blackboard-style illustration of the central idea. Best for data, predictions, or systemic concepts.

## Instructions
Draft a Nano Banana image generation prompt (under 400 words). Use:
- Chalk style keywords: "Textured chalk on blackboard", "vibrant pastel colors", "dramatic spotlight", "dusty texture"
- Quote card keywords: "Vector graphic", "flat design", "clean bold typography", "deep navy and gold"
- Include the aspect ratio in parentheses at the end: (Aspect Ratio: 1:1)

Return ONLY valid JSON.

options.systemMessage: You are a JSON-only API that generates image prompts. Return only valid JSON.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO processed_videos (video_id, channel_id, video_title, video_url, getlate_post_id)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO NOTHING
RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Filter Recent Videos').item.json.video_id,
  $('Filter Recent Videos').item.json.channel_id,
  $('Filter Recent Videos').item.json.video_title,
  $('Filter Recent Videos').item.json.video_url,
  $json.post?.id || null
] }}
